name: Brightest, Blazing, Branded King
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>赫</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かがや</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ける<ruby lang="jp"><rb>王</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>烙</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>らく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>印</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>いん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Choose 1 Fusion Monster you control that mentions "Fallen of Albaz" as material, and negate the effects of all other face-up cards currently on the field until the end of this turn. During the End Phase, if a Fusion Monster(s) was sent to your GY this turn: You can add this card from the GY to your hand. You can only use 1 "Brightest, Blazing, Branded King" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
eff: Choose 1 Fusion Monster you control that mentions "Fallen of Albaz" as material, and negate the effects of all other face-up cards currently on the field until the end of this turn. During the End Phase, if a Fusion Monster(s) was sent to your GY this turn: You can add this card from the GY to your hand. You can only use 1 "Brightest, Blazing, Branded King" effect per turn, and only once that turn.

action: Returns itself from Graveyard to hand
mst: Negates the effects of Effect Monsters
Negates the effects of Spell Cards
Negates the effects of Trap Cards
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
